stylePrompt: Create a completely original Dopamine Decor lighting product designed to trigger joy, optimism, and playful self-expression. Use confident high-saturation color blocking, friendly sculptural geometry, and optional color-changing ambient light while maintaining premium detailing and real manufacturing logic. The lamp should be energetic and photogenic, with a clear visual hierarchy rather than random rainbow decoration.
specificElements: An electric-blue body with an orange diffuser
Stacked rounded forms in contrasting colors
A playful loop carrying concealed light
A mint-green base with a coral accent
A bold silhouette readable from across a room
metalTranslationPrompt: Use bold powder-coated metal in controlled high-saturation color blocking, playful geometric shades, contrasting metal joints, and modular repeatable parts while preserving clear lighting function.
